title: Raid on Bilbringi
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Bilbringi}} {{Battle |prev=[[Ambush on Trogan]] |conc= |next=[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (Thrawn campaign)|Battle of Yag'Dhul]] |image=[[File:Raid_Bilbringi.jpg]] |name=Raid on the Bilbringi Shipyards |conflict= |date=[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] |place=[[Bilbringi Shipyards]] ([[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]) |result=[[Smugglers' Alliance]] victory |side1=Smugglers' Alliance |side2=[[Thrawn's confederation]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= *[[Mazzic]] *[[Ellor]] |commanders2=[[General/Legends|General]] [[Theol Drost]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= *2 [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 frigates]] *c. 20 Armed [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] |forces2=*Bilbringi Shipyards defense fleet **[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=None |casual2= *1 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] under construction *TIE Fighters |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|What do you suppose this is all about?''"
"''No idea. According to Par'tah, all Mazzic would say was that I might want to come by Bilbringi.''"
"''Probably the eye-catching lesson for the Empire he and Ellor were talking about at Trogan. I don't think I'm going to like this.|[[Aves]] and [[Talon Karrde]]|''[[The Last Command]]''}} The '''Raid on Bilbringi''' was a raid by the newly established [[Smugglers' Alliance]] on the part of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Mazzic]] and [[Ellor]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]] in retaliation of the [[Ambush on Trogan]]. ==Prelude== After the Imperial ambush during the smuggler meeting on [[Trogan/Legends|Trogan]], [[Mazzic]] and [[Ellor]] needed to teach the Empire a lesson and attacked the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]] to avenge the death of the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] smuggler [[Lishma]]. ==The raid== Around twenty of Mazzic's [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] penetrated discreetly the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|system]] and destroyed a nearly completed [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] within the construction docks of the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]]. The ships were attacked by [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], which were easily destroyed by Ellor's [[DP20 gunship/Legends|two Corellian Gunships]] that arrived to cover their escape. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Then I should like to hear your reasons why I should not order your immediate execution.|[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to [[Niles Ferrier]]|}} [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] was very angry about the loss of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and the implication of the smugglers in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|war]]. He tried to convince them that he wasn't responsible for the ambush on [[Trogan/Legends|Trogan]] but failed because they quickly discovered that Ferrier was an Imperial agent and the organizer of the ambush. [[Talon Karrde]], who had been invited to watch by Mazzic, was present during the raid, and just before the explosion of the Star Destroyer, he noticed the twenty-two [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] that Thrawn would later use to [[Siege of Coruscant|attack]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[The Last Command 3|''The Last Command'' 3]] {{1stp}} ==Sources== *''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Thrawn}} {{Interlang |de=Scharmützel von Bilbringi |es=Incursión en Bilbringi }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bilbringi, Raid on}} [[Category:Battles in the Bilbringi system]] [[Category:Battles of the Thrawn campaign]]
